prose.title: 68f army
prose.body: The 68F Army MOS (Military Occupational Specialty) is for Air and Missile Defense (AMD) Crewmembers. They are responsible for operating and maintaining air defense systems, including radar, early warning systems, and command and control systems, to protect the Army from missile and aerial attacks. Their duties also involve identifying potential threats, tracking targets, and assisting in the coordination of air defense operations. Additionally, they are trained in the use of various communication equipment and may be responsible for relaying critical information to command personnel.
